extName.description: Extension name, shown in the browser toolbar/extensions page.

extDescription.message: Capturez et archivez des pages sur votre instance recueil auto-hébergée
extDescription.description: Extension description, shown on the browser extensions page/store listing.

loading.description: Shown briefly while the popup determines pairing state.

fieldInstanceUrl.description: Label for the pairing form's Worker URL field.

fieldPairingToken.description: Label for the pairing form's pairing token field.

fieldDeviceName.description: Label for the pairing form's (optional) device name field.

pairButton.description: Submit button on the pairing form, idle state.

pairButtonPairing.description: Submit button on the pairing form, while the pair request is in flight.

errorUrlAndTokenRequired.message: L'URL de l'instance et le jeton d'association sont requis.
errorUrlAndTokenRequired.description: Validation error when either required pairing field is left blank.

errorInvalidUrl.message: Cela ne ressemble pas à une URL valide.
errorInvalidUrl.description: Validation error when the instance URL field doesn't parse as a URL.

errorPermissionDenied.message: recueil a besoin d'une autorisation pour communiquer avec votre instance — veuillez l'accorder et réessayer.
errorPermissionDenied.description: Shown when the browser's <all_urls> permission prompt is denied during pairing.

pairedStatusSub.description: Small subtitle next to the heading once paired.

labelInstance.description: Label for the paired instance's URL in the paired-view info list.

labelThisDevice.description: Label for this device's name in the paired-view info list.

captureButton.description: Button that captures the current tab.

capturing.description: Capture button status while a capture is in progress.

captureSaved.description: Capture button status after a successful capture.

unpairLink.description: Link that unpairs this device from the recueil instance.

queueHeading.description: Heading for the queue section of the paired view.

queueRefresh.description: Manual refresh button for the queue list.

queueEmpty.message: Aucun élément dans la file d'attente.
queueEmpty.description: Shown in place of the queue list when there are no pending items.

queueClaiming.description: Status shown while a queue item claim request is in flight.

queueOpenedNewTab.description: Status shown after successfully claiming a queue item.

queueClaimConflict.message: recueil : cet élément est déjà en cours de traitement sur un autre appareil
queueClaimConflict.description: Claim failure: the item is actively claimed by another device (HTTP 409).

queueClaimGone.message: recueil : cet élément a déjà été capturé (ou a définitivement échoué)
queueClaimGone.description: Claim failure: the item is in a terminal state (HTTP 410).

queueClaimNotFound.description: Claim failure: the item doesn't exist, or belongs to another user (HTTP 404).

bookmarkSyncLabel.message: Synchroniser les pages archivées avec les favoris
bookmarkSyncLabel.description: Label for the bookmark-sync toggle checkbox.

bookmarkSyncPermissionDenied.description: Shown when the browser's bookmarks permission prompt is denied.
